command: fabio sql-database query --workspace $WS_ID --id $DB_ID --sql "SELECT TOP 3 id, name, amount FROM orders ORDER BY amount DESC"
description: Executes T-SQL against a Fabric SQL Database and returns rows as JSON objects.
notes: SQL input via --sql (inline), @file.sql (file), or stdin pipe. Uses TDS protocol with AAD token auth. Requires F4+ capacity (F2 returns error 18456). Cross-database queries NOT supported (unlike lakehouse SQL endpoint). Date columns return as ISO 8601 strings.
